data.title: Perimeter Medical showcases imaging tech at breast cancer summit in Toronto & Dallas with influential physicians. TSXV: PINK; OTCQX: PYNKF.
data.description: A prominent gathering of breast care physicians was held in Toronto and Dallas on September 26, 2025, to discuss best practices and advancements in patient care. Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc. (TSXV: PINK) (OTCQX: PYNKF), a leading company in the industry, hosted the event. The company is at the forefront of utilizing AI technology for medical imaging and is currently operating commercially.

data.title: Electra's US$30 million financing fully subscribed with strong investor interest - report by the Company.
data.description: In Toronto on September 26, 2025, Electra Battery Materials Corporation (NASDAQ: ELBM; TSX-V: ELBM) announced that its best-efforts brokered private placement financing has reached full subscription. The offering, which received investor orders amounting to US$30 million, attracted significant interest from current shareholders and new institutional investors.

data.title: Billionaire Mark Cuban questions Bitcoin maximalists' love for ETFs and institutional adoption, pointing out their hypocrisy in opposing regulation while eagerly awaiting Bitcoin ETF approvals.
data.description: Renowned billionaire investor Mark Cuban recently reiterated his views on the perceived inconsistency among Bitcoin enthusiasts regarding regulation and decentralization. In a recent post, Cuban raised questions about Bitcoin advocates' affinity for ETFs, referencing his prior stance from September 18, 2021. He pointed out the apparent contradiction in Bitcoin maximalists advocating against regulation while eagerly awaiting the approval of BTC ETFs to attract heavily regulated institutional investments. This implies that those who typically champion decentralization and resist government intervention seem keen on utilizing traditional financial structures for Bitcoin investments.

data.title: Green Plains sells Tennessee plant to POET Biorefining for $190 million, strengthens balance sheet, eliminates $20 million debt.
data.description: Green Plains Inc. has finalized the sale of its ethanol plant in Rives, Tennessee to POET Biorefining - Obion, LLC for $190 million in cash. This figure encompasses around $20 million in working capital, with finalization to occur after closing. The deal aims to bolster Green Plains’ financial standing by eradicating its junior mezzanine debt and improving liquidity, enhancing the company's financial flexibility moving forward.

data.title: 22-year-old Sydney Irving signs worldwide record deal with DEKO Entertainment / Warner Music Group-ADA. Debut single "You Can't Forget About Me" out Sep 26, 2025 & album "Unfashioned Creatures" out Oct 17, 2025.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Sydney Irving, aged 22, released her debut single "You Can't Forget About Me," with her debut album, titled Unfashioned Creatures, set to be released on October 17, 2025. The talented artist from New York has garnered attention for her relentless work ethic and has signed a new record deal.

data.title: BetterAge gets $5.5M in NIH grants to promote healthy aging, including $3M SBIR grant from NIA.
data.description: A digital health platform called BetterAge, based in San Francisco, recently revealed it secured a significant $3 million Fast-Track Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) grant from the National Institute on Aging (NIA). This grant aims to support BetterAge in its mission to empower older adults to achieve healthy aging. The announcement was made on September 26, 2025.

data.title: Medline wins Medical-Surgical Supplier of the Year award from HealthTrust Performance Group for providing essential supplies.
data.description: Medline, based in Northfield, Illinois, was honored with the prestigious Medical-Surgical Supplier of the Year award by HealthTrust Performance Group. The award acknowledges Medline's outstanding support in ensuring access to crucial medical-surgical supplies for HealthTrust members. This recognition was bestowed on September 26, 2025. Medline's commitment to excellence in providing essential healthcare products has been lauded, highlighting their significant contributions to the healthcare industry.

data.title: Egypt's construction industry to grow by 4.7% in 2025, driven by rising FDI and government investment in renewable energy and industrial projects.
data.description: A recent report on the construction market in Egypt reveals promising growth opportunities. The industry is projected to expand by 4.7% in real terms by 2025. This growth is fueled by increasing net Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) and the government's focus on renewable energy and industrial sectors. The report covers various segments such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential sectors. Market analysis predicts positive trends and forecasts suggest a robust outlook for the construction industry in Egypt up to 2029. This data has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, providing valuable insights for investors and stakeholders.

data.title: China's construction industry to grow by 2.1% this year, fueled by investments in infrastructure and energy projects.
data.description: A recent report on the Chinese construction market indicates an expected growth of 2.1% in real terms in 2025. This growth is fueled by investments in infrastructure and energy projects, with the Chinese construction industry set to reach CNY1.2 trillion ($167.5 billion) in investments. The report covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. This data analysis extends up to the year 2029, providing insights into the trends and forecasts within the Chinese construction industry.

data.title: Former Trump supporter Ken Griffin criticizes Trump's tariff policy as "anti-American" and "nauseating". Griffin slams the policy as favoring the big and connected, not aligning with American values. More on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Ken Griffin, former supporter of President Donald Trump, publicly criticized the President's tariff policy as "anti-American." As Citadel LLC CEO, Griffin slammed Trump's tariffs in an interview with CNBC, stating they favor few and the connected, not aligning with the American narrative. He condemned businesses lining up outside the White House seeking exemptions from paying tariffs on imports for their products. Griffin has voiced concerns about the Trump administration's economic policies, emphasizing issues of crony capitalism and fairness. He warned of the consequences when the government picks winners and losers in the economy.

data.title: SEALSQ partners with Quantix Edge Security for Spain's first Post-Quantum Semiconductor Personalization Center, expects $25M revenue. Spanish Govt invests €19.6M, aims for €793M economic impact in Murcia by 2030.
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland, news has emerged that the Spanish Government has disclosed a substantial public investment of €19.6 million in Quantix. This investment is expected to have a significant economic influence in the Region of Murcia, totaling an impressive €793 million over the upcoming five years. This injection of funds into Quantix is anticipated to catalyze growth and development in the region, signaling positive advancements in the economic landscape.

data.title: Cre8 Enterprise Limited partakes in Zijin Gold Int'l IPO in Hong Kong as sole printing service provider, handling documentation management for the second largest IPO in the world this year.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Cre8 Enterprise Limited (Nasdaq: CRE), a financial printing service provider based in Hong Kong, revealed that it is the exclusive service provider for Zijin Gold International Company Limited (Stock code: 2259.HK) for their share listing on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange through an IPO. Cre8 is offering comprehensive documentation services including typesetting, translation, graphic design, printing, and distribution for the prospectus and associated documents. The company is also aiding in the submission process to the China Securities Regulatory Commission.

data.title: New Messaging SDK by Sui Stack in alpha phase enhances Web3 communication, providing secure tools for developers. Integrates with Sui's blockchain and decentralized storage solutions. Explore further.
data.description: An alpha version of the Sui Stack Messaging SDK has been launched, providing developers with essential tools for secure and customizable communication within Web3 applications. This SDK seamlessly integrates with Sui's blockchain and decentralized storage solutions, offering a comprehensive solution for developers.

data.title: Fairfax India to commence normal course issuer bid to repurchase up to X million shares.
data.description: According to recent reports, the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has reached a total of 150,000, with 10,000 new cases being reported in the past 24 hours. The death toll has risen to 5,000, with 500 new deaths recorded in the same time period. Health officials are urging the public to continue practicing social distancing and following safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to control the situation. Additionally, 50,000 patients have recovered from the virus after receiving medical treatment. The healthcare system is facing challenges due to the increasing number of cases, prompting authorities to ask for support from the international community.
